items.speaker: Maqi
items.text: If you ask me, there is a clue you can get from one book fan.

options.text: May I ask for a name?
Where is our book fan, then?

items.speaker: Maqi
items.text: His name is Xieyang, often seen around the Jinzhou Institute during the daytime.

items.speaker: Maqi
items.text: He has a reservoir of ideas for this book, generous in providing suggestions. But...

items.speaker: Maqi
items.text: His words are usually saddled with riddles.

items.speaker: Maqi
items.text: No, he is easy to get along with. But his words are usually saddled with riddles...

items.speaker: Maqi
items.text: We all can tell his passion for Second Coming of Solaris, but that doesn't make our conversations easier.

items.speaker: Maqi
items.text: However, I have the feeling that you can understand him.

options.text: Well, I happen to speak the language of these geeks.

items.speaker: Maqi
items.text: Though I'm not sure if Riddler is the right word, you seem pretty confident in this.

items.speaker: Maqi
items.text: Then I'll entrust you to this.
